slides.title: The brand ambition
bullets: The core pressure is clarity: a promising insomnia treatment with no shared story across medical, commercial, and leadership
The richer territory is helping people feel in control of their nights again, away from crowded functional sleep promises
Velorixa stays a credible treatment brand with the science front and centre, not lifestyle wellness

slides.title: Proposal shape
bullets: Four phases: foundation, creative system, launch planning, activation toolkit, each with decision points
Research is a lean validation sprint with patient and HCP stimulus testing, not a large segmentation study
Guiding principle: enough evidence to decide, not enough research to avoid deciding
